# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type AppConfig = {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS?: Record<string, boolean>;
  [key: string]: unknown;
};

const DEFAULT_API_KEY = 'vercel_default_key_789';
const DEFAULT_DB_URL = 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';

function parseEdgeConfig(raw: string | undefined): AppConfig {
  if (!raw) return {};
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? (parsed as AppConfig) : {};
  } catch {
    return {};
  }
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const edgeConfig = parseEdgeConfig(process.env.EDGE_CONFIG);
  const apiKey = typeof edgeConfig.API_KEY === 'string' && edgeConfig.API_KEY ? edgeConfig.API_KEY : DEFAULT_API_KEY;
  const dbUrl = typeof edgeConfig.DB_URL === 'string' && edgeConfig.DB_URL ? edgeConfig.DB_URL : DEFAULT_DB_URL;
  const featureFlags = edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS && typeof edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS === 'object' ? edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS : {};

  const body = {
    apiKey,
    dbUrl,
    featureFlags,
    method: req.method,
    ok: true,
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
      'cache-control': 'no-store',
    },
  });
}
